title: Cupric Loot
description: Adds copper loot to structure chests
body:
This datapack adds copper related gear to certain structure chests. Check the **gallery** for more details.

Currently affects:


```
Woodland Mansion
Ocean Ruins (Big & Small)
Shipwreck (Treasure)
Buried Treasure
Monster Room
Mineshaft
Stronghold (Corridor & Crossing)
Trial Chamber (Corridor, Supply, & Entrance)
Village (Weaponsmith, Toolsmith, & Armorer)
```
